sources.note: Inventory defines research universe only; broker position size is excluded from PEI model sizing.

sources.summary: 近一週未觸發買進/賣出

missing_evidence: 本 inventory-scope PEI 批次未逐檔執行完整官方 filings、法說、consensus、估值模型與流動性模型查核
個人庫存僅用於定義研究宇宙；模型投組 sizing 未使用券商、股數或成本
需以公司公告、交易所/SEC 文件與正式 PEI specialist workflow 補強後，才可升級為 decision-ready
健康檢查已標示風險控管動作，模型投組維持 0%

stock_inventory_context.health_check_reason: 價格跌破 APEX break，且 PEI 官方證據未補齊；先降低價格破位與回撤風險。
stock_inventory_context.recent_trigger_summary: 近一週未觸發買進/賣出
stock_inventory_context.short_term_scenario: APEX 破位警戒；多/空/震盪 30/30/40%；warn 268.5；break 258
stock_inventory_context.invalidation_condition: PEI：官方營收、毛利、估值或 thesis 證據轉弱需重估；APEX：warn 268.5；break 258；跌破 break 或低於 warn 後無法收復則提高風控。
stock_inventory_context.data_limitations: 庫存合併 2026-06-26；K線窗 台股 2026-06-19~2026-06-25；報價來源 yfinance fast_info 2026-06-26T11:53:41+08:00；APEX 門檻來源 2026-06-26T11:53:41+08:00；PEI 為 partial/conditional；產業 thesis 採 2026-06-26 既有檔案與本次限制，缺公司級證據者採來源未提供/需後續查證。

portfolio_risk.model_portfolio_size: 0%; watch only until thesis and risk evidence improve
portfolio_risk.downside_or_stop_distance: not independently verified in inventory-scope batch
portfolio_risk.hedge_posture: No hedge; model portfolio remains cash for this name until evidence clears
portfolio_risk.add_rule: Open or add only after full PEI specialist workflow confirms thesis, trigger, price context, liquidity, and risk/reward
portfolio_risk.trim_rule: 價格跌破 APEX break，且 PEI 官方證據未補齊；先降低價格破位與回撤風險。
portfolio_risk.exit_rule: PEI：官方營收、毛利、估值或 thesis 證據轉弱需重估；APEX：warn 268.5；break 258；跌破 break 或低於 warn 後無法收復則提高風控。
portfolio_risk.max_loss_posture: 0 units at risk because inventory-scope model size is 0%
portfolio_risk.monitoring_cadence: Daily price and weekly fundamentals while held in inventory watch universe
